classData.comment:
/**
 * Query to fetch the full conversation for a pull request.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String! - Repository owner
 * - $repo: String! - Repository name
 * - $prNumber: Int! - The pull request number
 * - $maxComments: Int! - Max comments to fetch
 */
classData.description:
Query to fetch the full conversation for a pull request.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String! - Repository owner
  • $repo: String! - Repository name
  • $prNumber: Int! - The pull request number
  • $maxComments: Int! - Max comments to fetch
classData.name: GET_CONVERSATION

classData.comment:
/**
 * Query to fetch a list of pull requests.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String! - Repository owner
 * - $repo: String! - Repository name
 * - $limit: Int! - Number of PRs per page
 * - $states: [PullRequestState!] - Filter by state (e.g., [OPEN])
 */
classData.description:
Query to fetch a list of pull requests.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String! - Repository owner
  • $repo: String! - Repository name
  • $limit: Int! - Number of PRs per page
  • $states: [PullRequestState!] - Filter by state (e.g., [OPEN])
classData.name: FETCH_PULL_REQUESTS

classData.comment:
/**
 * Query to fetch pull requests for synchronization, including reviews and comments.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String!
 * - $repo: String!
 * - $limit: Int!
 * - $cursor: String
 * - $states: [PullRequestState!]
 * - $maxComments: Int!
 * - $maxReviews: Int!
 */
classData.description:
Query to fetch pull requests for synchronization, including reviews and comments.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String!
  • $repo: String!
  • $limit: Int!
  • $cursor: String
  • $states: [PullRequestState!]
  • $maxComments: Int!
  • $maxReviews: Int!
classData.name: FETCH_PULL_REQUESTS_FOR_SYNC

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Single-PR variant of {@link FETCH_PULL_REQUESTS_FOR_SYNC} for the force-refetch path.
 *
 * Returns the identical sync node shape (body + comments + reviews + frontmatter fields) for ONE
 * pull request by number, bypassing the bulk delta-by-`updatedAt` gating so a known-stale local
 * mirror can be force-re-rendered from current GitHub state.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String!
 * - $repo: String!
 * - $prNumber: Int!
 * - $maxComments: Int!
 * - $maxReviews: Int!
 */
classData.summary:
Single-PR variant of {@link FETCH_PULL_REQUESTS_FOR_SYNC} for the force-refetch path.

Returns the identical sync node shape (body + comments + reviews + frontmatter fields) for ONE
pull request by number, bypassing the bulk delta-by-`updatedAt` gating so a known-stale local
mirror can be force-re-rendered from current GitHub state.

Variables required:
- $owner: String!
- $repo: String!
- $prNumber: Int!
- $maxComments: Int!
- $maxReviews: Int!
classData.name: FETCH_SINGLE_PULL_FOR_SYNC

classData.comment:
/**
 * Query to get the global ID of a pull request.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String! - Repository owner
 * - $repo: String! - Repository name
 * - $prNumber: Int! - The pull request number
 */
classData.description:
Query to get the global ID of a pull request.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String! - Repository owner
  • $repo: String! - Repository name
  • $prNumber: Int! - The pull request number
classData.name: GET_PULL_REQUEST_ID
